title: Fig. 3 in The relationships among Leishmania infantum and phyllostomid bats assessed by histopathological and molecular assays
author: Silva, Alanderson Rodrigues da
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Photomicrography of spleen of an adult male Artibeus planirostris qPCR Leishmania infantum positive. No amastigotes forms were found, only unspecific mild hyperplasia (big ellipse) and hypoplasia (small ellipse) of lymphoid follicles in the reactive white pulp. Note the lack of delimitation between the WP and red pulp (RP), H&E, 10x objective. (For interpretation of the references to colour in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the Web version of this article.)
